title: User Registration Success
description: Verify that a new user can successfully register with valid details and receive appropriate role assignment.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page.
Input valid registration details including email, username, password, and select a user role.
Submit the registration form.
Check that the registration completes successfully and the user is redirected to the login page or dashboard appropriate to their role.

title: User Registration with Existing Email
description: Verify the system prevents registration using an email address that already exists in the system and displays a clear error message.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page.
Input registration details using an email already registered.
Submit the registration form.
Verify that registration is blocked and an error message about duplicate email is shown.

title: User Login with Correct Credentials
description: Verify successful login for registered users with valid email and password for all roles (Student, Teacher, Admin).

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Input valid email and password credentials for the selected role.
Click the login button.
Confirm the user is logged in successfully and redirected to the appropriate dashboard based on their role.

title: User Login with Incorrect Password
description: Verify that login fails when a registered email is submitted with an incorrect password and an appropriate error message is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Input registered email with an incorrect password.
Click the login button.
Check that login is rejected and a relevant error message is displayed.

title: Role-Based Access Control Enforcement
description: Ensure that access to features and UI elements are restricted properly based on user roles (Admin, Teacher, Student).

steps.description: Login as Admin and verify access to the Admin Dashboard and all management features.
Confirm access to user management, survey management, complaint handling, and system settings is available.
Login as Teacher and verify access only to teacher-specific features such as survey creation, analytics, and profile management.
Confirm that admin and student-only features are not accessible or visible.
Login as Student and verify access only to survey taking, analytics viewing, and profile management.
Confirm that admin and teacher-only features are not accessible or visible.

title: Survey Creation by Teacher
description: Verify that a teacher can create, save, and edit a survey successfully and that the saved survey is accessible for student participants.

steps.description: Login as a teacher.
Navigate to the survey creation page.
Create a new survey with multiple questions of various types.
Save the survey.
Verify the survey is saved properly and appears in the list of available surveys.
Login as a student and navigate to the survey participation page.
Confirm the newly created survey is listed and available for participation.

title: Student Survey Participation Flow
description: Verify that a student can open, complete, and submit surveys properly and receive confirmation.

steps.description: Login as a student.
Navigate to the surveys list and select an available survey.
Answer all required questions with valid inputs.
Submit the survey.
Verify submission confirmation appears and the survey result is recorded in the system.

title: AI-Powered Survey Analytics Accuracy
description: Check that AI-generated analytics and insights for surveys are accurate, meaningful, and displayed correctly in teacher and student dashboards.

steps.description: Login as teacher and open analytics for a completed survey.
Confirm that visual charts, AI-generated insights, and summaries are displayed and align with underlying survey data.
Login as student and open analytics for surveys participated in.
Check that accessible analytics and AI insights are available in the student portal.

title: AI Chat Interface Functional Test
description: Verify that users can interact with the AI-powered chat interface, submit natural language queries against survey data, and receive meaningful replies.

steps.description: Login as any user role.
Open the AI chat interface.
Enter a variety of natural language questions about survey data.
Verify that the chat responds with correct, relevant and coherent answers or analytics.

title: Admin Dashboard User Management
description: Confirm that the admin can add, edit, deactivate, and delete user accounts with reflected changes in the system.

steps.description: Login as admin.
Navigate to user management section.
Add a new user with valid details.
Check the new user appears in the user list.
Edit user details.
Verify changes are saved and reflected.
Deactivate and subsequently delete a user.
Confirm the user is no longer active and removed from user lists appropriately.

title: Data Visualization and Real-time Dashboard Updates
description: Validate that charts, graphs, and statistics on dashboards update in real-time and display accurate data visualization across roles.

steps.description: Login as admin, teacher, and student (separately).
Navigate to respective dashboards with real-time analytical display.
Confirm that interactive charts and stats reflect up-to-date data and respond to user interaction (filters, exports).

title: Session Management and Security
description: Ensure that user sessions are securely managed allowing proper timeout, logout, and preventing unauthorized access after logout or session expiration.

steps.description: Login as any user.
Remain idle for session timeout period.
Verify the user is logged out automatically after the session expires.
Attempt to access protected resources with no active session.
Confirm access is denied and redirected to login.
Perform logout manually.
Confirm session is destroyed and subsequent resource access redirects to login.

title: API Endpoint Success Response and Error Handling
description: Verify that all RESTful API endpoints respond correctly with expected data formats for valid requests and handle error cases gracefully with proper status codes and messages.

steps.description: Send valid requests to API endpoints including training data, markdown reading, and AI chat.
Confirm responses contain correctly structured data compliant with API specs.
Send invalid or unauthorized requests to the same endpoints.
Verify that responses have appropriate error codes (e.g. 400, 401, 404) and informative error messages.

title: Responsive Design Verification Across Devices
description: Verify that all portals (Admin, Teacher, Student) and public pages are fully functional and visually consistent in desktop, tablet, and mobile screen sizes using Bootstrap 5 responsive design.

steps.description: Open the platform on multiple devices with differing screen resolutions (desktop, tablet, mobile).
Verify that layout, navigation, buttons, forms, and data visualizations adapt appropriately without content overlapping or breaking.
Perform common flows (login, survey participation, analytics viewing) on all devices.
Confirm consistent user experience and responsiveness.

title: Built-in Markdown Viewer Accessibility and Accuracy
description: Verify that system documentation and help materials rendered through the built-in Markdown viewer are accessible on public and internal pages with correct formatting.

steps.description: Navigate to documentation and help pages that use the built-in Markdown viewer.
Verify that markdown content is correctly rendered with expected headings, links, formatting, and images.
Access markdown content via the respective API.
Validate response provides the correct raw or rendered markdown content.
